response.justification: Solid full-stack engineer with ~15 years of varied experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the profile does not match a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI products or platforms shipped at scale, cloud platform leadership, or advising strategic customers — the role expects a known AI builder, not a generalist senior developer.
strengths: ~15 years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Track record of founding projects, teaching, and public talks/workshops
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise
No cloud platform strategy or Director-level IC leadership scope
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers/partners at executive level

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Recent MCP and AI-agent tooling exposure
